children.heading: Alternate Essential Air Service Pilot Program.—
children.label: a Alternate Essential Air Service Pilot Program.—

children.heading: .—Establishment
children.label: 1 .—Establishment
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation shall establish an alternate essential air service pilot program in accordance with the requirements of this section.

children.heading: .—Assistance to eligible places
children.label: 2 .—Assistance to eligible places
children.text: In carrying out the program, the Secretary, instead of paying compensation to an air carrier to provide essential air service to an eligible place, may provide assistance directly to a unit of local government having jurisdiction over the eligible place or a State within the boundaries of which the eligible place is located.

children.label: A
children.text: To provide assistance to air carriers that will use smaller equipment to provide the service and to consider increasing the frequency of service using such smaller equipment if the Secretary determines that passenger safety would not be compromised by the use of such smaller equipment and if the State or unit of local government waives the minimum service requirements under section 41732(b).

children.label: B
children.text: To provide assistance to an air carrier to provide on-demand air taxi service to and from the eligible place.

children.label: C
children.text: To provide assistance to a person to provide scheduled or on-demand surface transportation to and from the eligible place and an airport in another place.

children.label: D
children.text: In combination with other units of local government in the same region, to provide transportation services to and from all the eligible places in that region at an airport or other transportation center that can serve all the eligible places in that region.

children.label: E
children.text: To pay for other transportation or related services that the Secretary may permit.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: An entity seeking to participate in a program under this section shall submit to the Secretary an application in such form and containing such information as the Secretary may require.

children.label: A
children.text: a statement of the amount of compensation or assistance required; and

children.label: B
children.text: a description of how the compensation or assistance will be used.

children.heading: .—Participation Requirements
children.label: c .—Participation Requirements
children.text: An eligible place for which compensation or assistance is provided under this section in a fiscal year shall not be eligible in that fiscal year for the essential air service that it would otherwise be entitled to under this subchapter.

children.heading: .—Subsequent Participation
children.label: d .—Subsequent Participation
children.text: A unit of local government participating in the program under this subsection (a) in a fiscal year shall not be prohibited from participating in the basic essential air service program under this subchapter in a subsequent fiscal year if such unit is otherwise eligible to participate in such program.

children.heading: .—Funding
children.label: e .—Funding
children.text: Amounts appropriated or otherwise made available to carry out the essential air service program under this subchapter shall be available to carry out this section.
